en.title: Low-Altitude Economy · The EM Twin for Urban Low-Altitude Communications

fields.Badge: Vertical Datasheet · 低空 / Low Altitude
fields.Headline: The EM Twin for Urban Low-Altitude Communications
fields.Headline-em: Let the drone's "invisible airways" prove out in simulation first
fields.Sub: The core tension of the low-altitude economy lies between the complex electromagnetic environment a few hundred meters up and the near-zero-interruption demands placed on C2, video downlink, and positioning. With a three-tier solution of ray tracing + virtual drive test + EM twin, MetaRadio turns this invisible low-altitude electromagnetic map into engineering infrastructure that can be simulated, tested, and operated across urban buildings, tower clutter, and air-ground integrated networks.

items.title: Headline
items.text: The EM Twin for Urban Low-Altitude Communications

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: Let the drone's "invisible airways" prove out in simulation first

items.title: Sub
items.text: The core tension of the low-altitude economy lies between the complex electromagnetic environment a few hundred meters up and the near-zero-interruption demands placed on C2, video downlink, and positioning. With a three-tier solution of ray tracing + virtual drive test + EM twin, MetaRadio turns this invisible low-altitude electromagnetic map into engineering infrastructure that can be simulated, tested, and operated across urban buildings, tower clutter, and air-ground integrated networks.

table.Label: Full coverage across urban low-altitude heights

sections.label: Electromagnetic Challenges of Low-Altitude Scenarios
sections.heading: Challenge · Electromagnetic Challenges of Low-Altitude Scenarios

fields.Title: Urban low altitude is the most uncertain stretch of space for wireless signals
fields.Description: The low-altitude band of 50–600 m sits between the ground cellular main lobe and satellite coverage—precisely the most uncertain "interlayer" of electromagnetic coverage. UAV logistics, urban inspection, eVTOL commuting, and similar use cases demand near-aviation-grade communication continuity, yet the underlying electromagnetic environment is almost a blank slate.

table.Title: Building and tower-clutter reflections
table.Text: Urban building clusters create dense reflections and blockage at low altitude; with ground cellular main lobes pointing downward, low-altitude coverage forms "funnel-shaped" caves.

table.Title: High-reliability C2 link
table.Text: Control links require millisecond-level latency and ≥ 99.999% availability—conditions on which traditional statistical models cannot deliver deterministic conclusions.

table.Title: UTM regulatory coordination
table.Text: Low-altitude management needs "electromagnetic airway" semantics, yet current UTM systems generally lack electromagnetic-layer data.

sections.label: Deploying the Three Tiers in Low Altitude
sections.heading: Solution · Deploying the Three Tiers in Low Altitude

fields.Title: Ray tracing → virtual drive test → EM twin, a closed loop serving low altitude
fields.Description: The three-tier solution maps step by step onto the three stages of low-altitude R&D, testing, and operations. From simulated airways and ground station planning, to UAV C2/video-downlink HIL testing, to a real-time EM twin interworking with UTM, it forms an end-to-end low-altitude electromagnetic toolchain.

table.Description: Urban low-altitude 3D channel simulation: buildings + tower clutter + multiple base stations, outputting RSRP/SINR/multipath and Doppler along the route.
Simulated channels drive the channel emulator and UAV communication test bench, running HIL regression on C2, video downlink, and 5G-A modules.
An urban low-altitude EM twin interworking with the UTM platform, delivering real-time route recommendations and anomaly alerts.

table.Title: Urban low-altitude modeling
table.Desc: High-precision 3D city model + live-network base station configuration + planned routes/takeoff-and-landing points.

table.Title: Airway electromagnetic simulation
table.Desc: The RT engine generates time-varying multipath, coverage blind spots, Doppler, and handover risk maps along the route.

table.Title: C2/video-downlink HIL
table.Desc: The channel emulator drives real UAV modules/ground stations to run link-loss/jitter/handover regression.

table.Title: UTM closed-loop operations
table.Desc: Real-time electromagnetic situational awareness feeds into UTM, dynamically adjusting airways and takeoff/landing time windows.

table.Spec: 0 – 600 m (including the complex near-ground electromagnetic field zone for takeoff and landing)
C2: cellular FR1 / FR2 / 5G-A, dedicated C2 bands, Wi-Fi 6/7; video downlink: 5.8 GHz, mmWave
Urban logistics, inspection, police, emergency response, eVTOL UAM, crop protection, surveying and mapping
Along-route CIR/PDP, coverage holes, Doppler, multi-base-station joint SINR time series
UAV modules, ground stations, 5G-A high-band modules, mesh self-organizing networks
Mainstream UTM data formats already supported (USS/UAS Service Supplier)
Coordinated with regional low-altitude operating procedures; can output an evidence chain for electromagnetic airway approval
Public/private cloud, edge nodes; supports pilot city-scale clusters

fields.Dedicated \"low-altitude interlayer\" EM: Simultaneously accounts for the downtilted ground cellular main lobe, building reflections, and tower-clutter blockage.
fields.Deterministic KPIs for the C2 link: Goes beyond coverage maps to provide millisecond-level latency, packet-loss probability, and handover paths.
fields.HIL directly driving real UAV modules: Reproduces "instant loss-of-link" scenarios rarely encountered in the field.
fields.UTM data compatibility: Outputs an "electromagnetic airway" information layer that interworks with UAV traffic management platforms.
fields.Air-ground integrated planning: A single engine supports coordinated evaluation of ground networks, low-altitude networks, and satellite NTN.
fields.Visual delivery: 3D electromagnetic airways, risk heatmaps, and beam shadows visualized in a single view.

items.title: Dedicated "low-altitude interlayer" EM modeling
items.text: Simultaneously accounts for the downtilted ground cellular main lobe, building reflections, and tower-clutter blockage.

table.Title: Urban UAV logistics
table.Text: Route planning and C2-link SLA design for logistics companies.

table.Title: eVTOL / UAM
table.Text: Electromagnetic coverage of commuter routes and multi-base-station handover reliability verification.

table.Title: Police and emergency response
table.Text: On-demand electromagnetic airway generation and emergency backhaul for incident areas.

table.Title: Urban inspection
table.Text: Video-downlink link assurance for bridge, power, and gas inspection routes.

table.Title: Agricultural crop protection
table.Text: Cellular coverage and video-downlink reliability prediction for field operations.

table.Title: Air-ground integration
table.Text: Fused planning of ground + satellite + low-altitude multi-link.

table.Label: Pilot city low-altitude EM twin projects
Partnerships with UAV/eVTOL OEMs and operators
Integrated with multiple UAV management platforms

zh-CN.title: 低空经济 · 城市低空通信的电磁孪生

fields.Badge: Vertical Datasheet · 低空 / Low Altitude
fields.Eyebrow: 行业垂直市场解决方案
fields.Headline: 城市低空通信的电磁孪生
fields.Headline-em: 让无人机的"看不见的航道"先在仿真里跑通
fields.Sub: 低空经济的核心矛盾，是几百米高度的复杂电磁环境与对 C2、图传、定位"零中断"的极高要求之间的张力。乾径以射线跟踪 + 虚拟路测 + 电磁孪生三层方案，在城市楼宇、塔林与空地一体网络中，把这张看不见的低空电磁图，变成可仿真、可测试、可运营的工程基础设施。

items.title: Badge
items.text: Vertical Datasheet · 低空 / Low Altitude

items.title: Eyebrow
items.text: 行业垂直市场解决方案

items.title: Headline
items.text: 城市低空通信的电磁孪生

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: 让无人机的"看不见的航道"先在仿真里跑通

items.title: Sub
items.text: 低空经济的核心矛盾，是几百米高度的复杂电磁环境与对 C2、图传、定位"零中断"的极高要求之间的张力。乾径以射线跟踪 + 虚拟路测 + 电磁孪生三层方案，在城市楼宇、塔林与空地一体网络中，把这张看不见的低空电磁图，变成可仿真、可测试、可运营的工程基础设施。

table.Label: 与无人机管理平台联动

sections.label: 低空场景的电磁挑战
sections.heading: Challenge · 低空场景的电磁挑战

fields.Title: 城市低空，是无线信号最不确定的一段空间
fields.Description: 低空 50–600 m 区间，介于地面蜂窝主瓣与卫星覆盖之间，恰好是电磁覆盖最不确定的"夹层"。无人机物流、城市巡检、eVTOL 通勤等业务对通信连续性要求接近航空级，但底层电磁环境却几乎是空白。

table.Title: 楼宇与塔林反射
table.Text: 城市建筑群在低空形成密集反射与遮挡，地面蜂窝主瓣朝下，低空覆盖呈"漏斗状"洞穴。

table.Title: C2 链路高可靠
table.Text: 控制链路要求毫秒级时延、≥ 99.999% 可用性，传统统计模型给不出确定性结论。

table.Title: UTM 监管协同
table.Text: 低空管理需要"电磁航道"语义，但当前 UTM 系统普遍缺失电磁层数据。

sections.label: 三层产品在低空的部署
sections.heading: Solution · 三层产品在低空的部署

fields.Title: 射线跟踪 → 虚拟路测 → 电磁孪生，闭环服务低空
fields.Description: 三层方案逐级映射低空研发、测试与运营三个阶段。从仿真航道、地面台站规划，到无人机 C2/图传 HIL 测试，再到与 UTM 联动的实时电磁孪生，形成端到端低空电磁工具链。

table.Description: 城市低空 3D 信道仿真：楼宇 + 塔林 + 多基站，输出航线沿线 RSRP/SINR/多径与 Doppler。
仿真信道驱动信道仿真仪与 UAV 通信测试台，对 C2、图传、5G-A 模组开展 HIL 回归。
与 UTM 平台对接的城市低空电磁孪生，实时输出航线推荐与异常预警。

table.Title: 城市低空建模
table.Desc: 高精度 3D 城市模型 + 现网基站配置 + 计划航线/起降点。

table.Title: 航道电磁仿真
table.Desc: RT 引擎沿航线生成时变多径、覆盖盲区、多普勒与切换风险图。

table.Title: C2/图传 HIL
table.Desc: 信道仿真仪驱动真实 UAV 模组/地面站，做断链/抖动/切换回归。

table.Title: UTM 闭环运营
table.Desc: 实时电磁态势接入 UTM，动态调整航道与起降时间窗口。

table.规格: 0 – 600 m（含起降近地复杂电磁场区域）
C2: 蜂窝 FR1 / FR2 / 5G-A、专用 C2 频段、Wi-Fi 6/7；图传：5.8 GHz、毫米波
城市物流、巡检、警用、应急、eVTOL UAM、植保、测绘
沿航线 CIR/PDP、覆盖洞、Doppler、多基站联合 SINR 时序
无人机模组、地面站、5G-A 高频模组、Mesh 自组网
已支持主流 UTM 数据格式 (USS/UAS Service Supplier)
与各地低空运行规程协同，可输出电磁航道审批证据链
公有/私有云、边缘节点；支持试点城市级集群

fields.\"低空夹层\"专项电磁建模: 同时考虑地面蜂窝下倾主瓣、楼宇反射与塔林遮挡。
fields.C2 链路的确定性 KPI: 不只给覆盖图，给出毫秒级时延、丢包概率与切换路径。
fields.HIL 直驱 UAV 真实模组: 复现外场难以遇见的"瞬间失联"场景。
fields.UTM 数据兼容: 输出可与无人机交通管理平台对接的"电磁航道"信息层。
fields.空地一体规划: 同一引擎支持地面网络、低空网络、卫星 NTN 协同评估。
fields.可视化交付: 3D 电磁航道、风险热力、波束阴影一图可视。

items.title: "低空夹层"专项电磁建模
items.text: 同时考虑地面蜂窝下倾主瓣、楼宇反射与塔林遮挡。

items.title: C2 链路的确定性 KPI
items.text: 不只给覆盖图，给出毫秒级时延、丢包概率与切换路径。

items.title: HIL 直驱 UAV 真实模组
items.text: 复现外场难以遇见的"瞬间失联"场景。

items.title: UTM 数据兼容
items.text: 输出可与无人机交通管理平台对接的"电磁航道"信息层。

items.title: 空地一体规划
items.text: 同一引擎支持地面网络、低空网络、卫星 NTN 协同评估。

items.title: 可视化交付
items.text: 3D 电磁航道、风险热力、波束阴影一图可视。

table.Title: 城市无人机物流
table.Text: 物流公司航线规划与 C2 链路 SLA 设计。

table.Title: eVTOL / UAM
table.Text: 通勤航线电磁覆盖与多基站切换可靠性验证。

table.Title: 警用与应急
table.Text: 突发事件区域临时电磁航道生成与应急回传。

table.Title: 城市巡检
table.Text: 桥梁、电力、燃气巡检航线的图传链路保障。

table.Title: 农业植保
table.Text: 大田作业蜂窝覆盖与图传可靠性预测。

table.Title: 空地一体
table.Text: 地面 + 卫星 + 低空多链路融合规划。

table.Label: 试点城市低空电磁孪生项目
UAV/eVTOL OEM 与运营方合作
与多家无人机管理平台对接
